name: rancher-browser
description: Chromium with Rancher quick-login and automation.

params.description: AppCo email for the command menu's OCI chart repository command
AppCo access token for the command menu's OCI chart repository command
AWS access key — the rancher bootstrap creates the aws-credential cloud credential from it (used by the EC2 cluster command)
AWS secret key for the aws-credential cloud credential
Default region for the AWS cloud credential
